testing.real_database: HardShell suite uses actual SQLite (never mocked)

data_fetching.cache_strategy: Optimistic updates on mutations (star, delete, edit, archive)

frontend_performance.memoization: useMemo on filteredBookmarks, bookmarkCounts, allTags; useCallback on folderBookmarkCount

docker.npm_install_strategy: npm install (NOT --omit=dev) — keeps tsx at runtime
docker.cmd_format: CMD ["npx", "tsx", "server.ts"] — uses npx to locate tsx
docker.entrypoint_logic: pass-through only — exec su-exec node "$@" without adding commands
docker.image_build: Copy only source files, never COPY . . (prevents stale dist/)
docker.failure_signature: su-exec: tsx: No such file or directory = check npm install and CMD

deployment.cloudflare_tunnel: Fully supported — see README.md Public Deployment section

cors_modes.lan_production: Allow LAN IPs only (when CORS_ORIGIN unset)
cors_modes.strict: Allowlist via CORS_ORIGIN env var (for CF Tunnel + reverse proxy)

environment_variables.TRUST_PROXY: true for CF Tunnel (reads x-forwarded-proto, real client IP)
environment_variables.CORS_ORIGIN: Comma-separated list for strict mode (e.g., https://your-domain.com)

phase_2_next: List view mode (connect prototype grid/list toggle)
phase_3_queued: Folder count badges (render calculated counts in sidebar)
Corrected folder behavior (fix CRUD, remove dead code)

performance_improvements.pagination: 690 items → 50 items per page (API + react-query) — 90% network reduction
performance_improvements.virtualization: 690 DOM nodes → ~15 active nodes (BookmarkGrid) — 46x DOM reduction
performance_improvements.cache_coherence: Mutations update cache locally, zero full refetch on star/archive/edit
performance_improvements.search_debounce: 300ms delay eliminates keystroke jank (73/73 tests passing)
performance_improvements.impact: Perceived load time ~10-15x faster, smooth scrolling, instant mutations
